title: Blueberry Crunch Overnight Oats
summary: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day. Make the most of that meal with these delicious blueberry-packed overnight oats.

method.description: Roughly chop the nuts and place them into a dry frying pan. Place onto medium heat and toast, stirring often, until golden, 5-8 mins. Tip half into a bowl and stir the honey and the rest of the topping ingredients through. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
In the empty pan, make the base: Tip in the frozen blueberries and honey on medium heat and stir until the blueberries have defrosted. Remove from the heat and let it cool down.

Add the oats and remaining frozen blueberries into the bowl with the nuts. Coarsely grate the apple into the mixture and stir through the lemon zest, milk, and yoghurt. Season with as much honey as you’d like, and a pinch of salt
Share the blueberry coulis into jars and ladle the oat mixture on top. Cover and refrigerate overnight so the oats can soften. Once ready to eat, serve the blueberry pots with the toasted nuts.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
